entry.title: Helicone
entry.description: Open-source LLM observability platform for logging, metrics, cost tracking, feedback, and gateway workflows.
entry.seoTitle: Helicone LLM observability and cost tracking
entry.seoDescription: Helicone provides LLM logging, metrics, cost tracking, feedback, and gateway workflows for AI applications.
entry.author: Helicone
entry.cardDescription: LLM observability and cost tracking platform.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Helicone is useful when cost visibility, request logging, and feedback capture are central to LLM operations.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
